title: Module Portal
description: A centralized web portal for accessing all internal enterprise modules. Features a card-based dashboard with 18+ modules including Check-in/Check-out, CMMS, HRMS, POS, Sales Dashboard, IT Equipment Repair, Employee Cards, and Work Logs — all in one unified interface.

title: CMMS — Maintenance System
description: A Computerized Maintenance Management System (CMMS) for tracking repair tickets, equipment status, and maintenance workflows. Includes a real-time dashboard with repair statistics, equipment status donut chart (2,726 machines tracked), task assignment, and review scoring.

title: CMMS Telegram Bot
description: A Telegram Bot integrated with the CMMS system that automatically notifies maintenance teams about new repair tickets in real-time. Sends structured messages with reporter info, equipment details, location, symptoms, and timestamps to a dedicated Telegram group.

title: SmartView Security Monitor
description: A custom-built Windows desktop application for live CCTV monitoring across the factory. Displays multi-camera grid views organized by zones (office, warehouse, production, etc.) with real-time video feeds, system online status, and toggle between factory floor and older cameras.

title: Contract Approval System
description: A document approval tracking system for employee contracts. Features a clean dashboard showing total documents, pending/approved status with progress bars, and downloadable PDF exports. Supports filtering by approval status and search by employee ID.

title: Roll Production Report
description: A production analytics dashboard for paper mill operations. Displays yearly/monthly/daily production output (23,705+ tons), machine-specific yields with bar charts, and grade-based breakdowns with donut charts. Real-time data visualization for PM1–PM5 production lines.

title: AutoBot Macro Recorder
description: A Windows desktop automation tool for recording and replaying keyboard/mouse macros. Features one-click recording (F5), stopping, and playback (F6) with support for single or continuous execution. Saves macro scripts with timestamps for reuse.

title: LINE Bot — IP Address Lookup
description: A LINE Bot integrated with Google Sheets via Apps Script for real-time IP address lookup. Users can query employee info by IP address and receive structured responses including department, name, and desk number — useful for IT helpdesk and network troubleshooting.

title: TWA — Time Attendance App
description: A modern mobile-first time attendance application for factory employees. Features fingerprint scanning for check-in/check-out, real-time clock display, weekly working hours summary, GPS-based location tracking, and a beautiful gradient UI with dark/light themes.

title: TWA — Light Theme
description: The light theme variant of the TWA time attendance application, featuring a soft pink gradient design. Demonstrates the app's theme customization capability with the same full functionality — fingerprint scanning, GPS tracking, working hours display, and employee profile.
